title: Build Your First Robot (Virtual Lab)
description: Learn the basics of Robotics! AI Shikshak will guide you step-by-step on how to assemble sensors, motors, and write code to make your virtual robot move.

title: Python Programming (Hinglish)
description: Coding seekhna ab hua aasan! Learn Python from scratch in a mix of Hindi and English. Create your own games and apps.

title: AI & Machine Learning Basics
description: Ever wondered how Face ID works? AI Shikshak will explain Machine Learning using fun, interactive examples you can try on your webcam.

title: Web Design: HTML/CSS
description: Design your very first website. The AI Rohini will act as your pair programmer, teaching you tags and styles in a fun way.
